mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO biz_enterprise_user (enterprise_id, username, password, name, phone, email, status, password_error_count, lock_time, is_first_login, activation_expire_time, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.status}, #{item.passwordErrorCount}, #{item.lockTime}, #{item.isFirstLogin}, #{item.activationExpireTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO biz_enterprise_user (enterprise_id, username, password, name, phone, email, status, password_error_count, lock_time, is_first_login, activation_expire_time, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.enterpriseId}, #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.name}, #{item.phone}, #{item.email}, #{item.status}, #{item.passwordErrorCount}, #{item.lockTime}, #{item.isFirstLogin}, #{item.activationExpireTime}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), phone = VALUES(phone), email = VALUES(email), status = VALUES(status), password_error_count = VALUES(password_error_count), lock_time = VALUES(lock_time), is_first_login = VALUES(is_first_login), activation_expire_time = VALUES(activation_expire_time), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
